title: Automated SEO Requirements
description: Extract structured SEO requirements from a brief, request, or planning document

primary_keyword.description: Main target keyword or phrase explicitly requested; empty string if not provided

secondary_keywords.description: Additional explicitly requested keywords, variants, or supporting terms

search_intent.description: Primary search intent supported by explicit evidence, or unclear if not stated

page_type_other.description: Single-word fallback when page_type is other; otherwise use an empty string

target_audience.description: Short description of the intended audience; empty string if not explicit

content_goal.description: Primary SEO or business goal explicitly stated in the input; empty string if not explicit

title_tag_requirements.description: Explicit requirements or constraints for the title tag

meta_description_requirements.description: Explicit requirements or constraints for the meta description

url_slug.description: Explicitly requested URL slug in lowercase hyphenated form; empty string if not provided

required_sections.description: Required page sections, headings, or content blocks explicitly requested

internal_link_targets.description: Internal pages, topics, or categories that should be linked if explicitly requested

structured_data_types.description: Structured data or schema.org types explicitly requested

constraints.description: Other explicit requirements, restrictions, or must-follow rules

open_questions.description: Important missing details that would block strong SEO execution; include only when clearly absent

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0 to 100 based on how explicit and complete the brief is
